name: Temple & Webster Group Ltd
analysis: TPW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 79% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.0400, stop A$4.8312, target A$7.7400 (1.41:1) — then trail it.
